name: 无限花纹 Infinite Pattern
short_description: This is a software for procedurally generating continuous patterns. You can generate unlimited patterns based on the pictures you upload, by simply dragging the mouse and configurating parameters.
detailed_description: This is a software for procedurally generating continuous patterns. You can generate unlimited patterns based on the pictures you upload, by simply dragging the mouse and configurating parameters. This software supports exporting png images, the maximum output resolution is 8192x8192, and has the function of automatic edge cropping. I wish you have fun with it!
about_the_game: This is a software for procedurally generating continuous patterns. You can generate unlimited patterns based on the pictures you upload, by simply dragging the mouse and configurating parameters. This software supports exporting png images, the maximum output resolution is 8192x8192, and has the function of automatic edge cropping. I wish you have fun with it!
supported_languages: English, French, German, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Korean, Hindi
